## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
Mark the relevant option(s) with an `x`.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore/refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build/CI configuration change

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran. Include steps to reproduce and any relevant screenshots.

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Tested build with `npm run build`
- [ ] Verified responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] Tested on Chrome, Firefox, Safari

## Checklist
Check all that apply.

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

List which parts of the site this PR affects.
